name: telegram
description: Telegram channel and messaging tool for Beige agents. Provides a GrammY-based bot that connects Telegram users to agents, plus a tool for agents to send proactive Telegram messages.
commands: sendMessage <chatId> <text>               — Send a message to a Telegram chat
sendMessage <chatId> --thread <id> <text> — Send to a specific thread/topic

token.description: Telegram Bot API token. Use ${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN} for env var injection.

allowedUsers.description: List of Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot.

default.description: Default agent name for all users.
